penalties.detail: 42% of declaration weight has no edges

layers.name: Public API & Config
layers.summary: Kernel-wide public headers and configuration glue — the surface every application and port includes (FreeRTOS.h, projdefs, portable contract, atomics, MPU prototypes).

classes.name: TaskFunction_t
classes.description_zh: 任务入口函数的指针类型，所有任务函数都必须符合该签名
classes.description_en: The function-pointer type every task entry point must conform to (returns void, takes one void* parameter).

layers.name: Port / HAL
layers.summary: The portability boundary where hardware (or the host OS) drives the kernel: architecture/compiler-specific context switch, tick and stack init — represented by the Cortex-M4F and POSIX-simulator ports.

classes.name: pxPortInitialiseStack
classes.signature: StackType_t * pxPortInitialiseStack( StackType_t * pxTopOfStack, TaskFunction_t pxCode, void * pvParameters )

classes.name: xPortStartScheduler
classes.description_zh: ARM Cortex-M4F：配置 SysTick 节拍中断、使能 FPU，并启动首个任务（开始多任务）
classes.description_en: ARM Cortex-M4F: configure the SysTick tick interrupt, enable the FPU, and start the first task — begins multitasking.

classes.name: vPortSuppressTicksAndSleep
classes.description_zh: Tickless idle 的核心：重编程 SysTick 后执行 WFI 让 CPU 低功耗休眠，醒来时把流逝的节拍补偿给内核。
classes.description_en: Core of tickless idle: reprograms SysTick then executes WFI to sleep the CPU, crediting the elapsed ticks back to the kernel on wake.

classes.name: vPortSetupTimerInterrupt
classes.description_zh: 配置 SysTick 定时器按 configTICK_RATE_HZ 产生周期性节拍中断，为调度器提供时间基准。
classes.description_en: Configures the SysTick timer to fire the periodic tick interrupt at configTICK_RATE_HZ, providing the scheduler's time base.

classes.name: prvGetThreadFromTask
classes.signature: static inline Thread_t * prvGetThreadFromTask( TaskHandle_t xTask )
classes.description_zh: 从任务栈区取回为该任务保存的 pthread 线程结构——任务句柄到宿主线程的映射枢纽。
classes.description_en: Recovers the pthread Thread_t stored in the task's stack area — the mapping hub from task handle to host thread.

classes.name: prvFatalError
classes.signature: void prvFatalError( const char * pcCall, int iErrno )
classes.description_zh: 打印失败的系统调用与 errno 后中止模拟器进程
classes.description_en: Print the failing syscall and errno, then abort the simulator process.

classes.name: prvPortSetCurrentThreadName
classes.signature: static void prvPortSetCurrentThreadName( const char * pxThreadName )

classes.name: pxPortInitialiseStack
classes.signature: StackType_t * pxPortInitialiseStack( StackType_t * pxTopOfStack, StackType_t * pxEndOfStack, TaskFunction_t pxCode, void * pvParameters )
classes.description_zh: 为任务创建一个挂起的 pthread，并把线程控制块嵌入任务栈顶
classes.description_en: Create a suspended pthread for the task, embedding its Thread_t control block at the top of the task stack.

classes.name: vPortStartFirstTask
classes.description_zh: 恢复首个任务对应的 pthread，启动模拟调度器
classes.description_en: Start the first task by resuming its corresponding pthread, kicking off the simulated scheduler.

classes.name: xPortStartScheduler
classes.description_zh: 启动 SIGALRM 节拍线程并恢复首个任务线程，主线程随后等待调度器结束
classes.description_en: Start the SIGALRM tick thread and resume the first task's pthread; the main thread then waits for scheduler shutdown.

classes.name: vPortEndScheduler
classes.description_zh: 停止节拍线程并唤醒主线程，结束宿主机上的模拟调度
classes.description_en: Stop the tick thread and signal the main thread, shutting down the simulated scheduler on the host.

classes.name: vPortEnterCritical
classes.description_zh: 进入临界区：屏蔽信号，等价于在主机模拟环境下关中断
classes.description_en: Enter a critical section by blocking signals — the host-simulation equivalent of disabling interrupts.

classes.name: vPortExitCritical
classes.description_zh: 退出临界区：嵌套归零时恢复信号
classes.description_en: Leave a critical section, re-enabling signals once the nesting count returns to zero.

classes.name: vPortYield
classes.description_zh: 在临界区内挂起当前任务的 pthread、恢复下一个，从而模拟上下文切换
classes.description_en: Yield by suspending the current task's pthread and resuming the next one inside a critical section — the simulated context switch.

classes.name: vPortDisableInterrupts
classes.description_zh: 通过在当前线程阻塞全部信号来模拟关中断
classes.description_en: Simulate disabling interrupts by blocking all signals on the calling thread.

classes.name: vPortEnableInterrupts
classes.description_zh: 解除信号屏蔽，等价于开中断
classes.description_en: Unblock signals to re-enable the simulated interrupts.

classes.name: prvSetupTimerInterrupt
classes.description_zh: 创建周期性投递 SIGALRM 节拍信号的计时线程
classes.description_en: Spawn the timer thread that periodically delivers the SIGALRM tick signal.

classes.name: vPortThreadDying
classes.signature: void vPortThreadDying( void * pxTaskToDelete, volatile BaseType_t * pxPendYield )

classes.name: prvSwitchThread
classes.signature: static void prvSwitchThread( Thread_t * pxThreadToResume, Thread_t * pxThreadToSuspend )

layers.name: Heap Management
layers.summary: Pluggable kernel heap allocators (heap_1..heap_5) implementing pvPortMalloc/vPortFree with different fragmentation, coalescence and multi-region trade-offs.

classes.name: pvPortMalloc
classes.description_zh: heap_1：最简分配器，从静态数组中切分内存，只分配从不释放
classes.description_en: heap_1: the simplest allocator — carve memory from a static array, with no support for freeing.

classes.name: pvPortMalloc
classes.description_zh: heap_2：以最佳匹配空闲表分配，支持释放但不合并相邻空闲块
classes.description_en: heap_2: allocate using a best-fit free list; supports freeing but does not coalesce adjacent free blocks.

classes.name: vPortFree
classes.description_zh: heap_2：将内存块放回空闲表，不合并相邻块（易碎片化）
classes.description_en: heap_2: return a block to the free list without merging neighbours (prone to fragmentation).

classes.name: pvPortCalloc
classes.signature: void * pvPortCalloc( size_t xNum, size_t xSize )

classes.name: pvPortMalloc
classes.description_zh: heap_3：封装标准库 malloc，并通过挂起调度器保证线程安全
classes.description_en: heap_3: a thread-safe wrapper around the standard C library malloc, guarded by suspending the scheduler.

classes.name: vPortFree
classes.description_zh: heap_3：在调度器锁保护下调用标准库 free
classes.description_en: heap_3: call the standard C library free under scheduler-lock protection.

classes.name: pvPortMalloc
classes.description_zh: heap_4：首次匹配分配并合并相邻空闲块，是抑制碎片的通用默认分配器
classes.description_en: heap_4: first-fit allocation that coalesces adjacent free blocks — the general-purpose default that minimises fragmentation.

classes.name: vPortFree
classes.description_zh: heap_4：释放内存块并与相邻空闲块合并以减少碎片
classes.description_en: heap_4: free a block and merge it with adjacent free blocks to reduce fragmentation.

classes.name: pvPortCalloc
classes.signature: void * pvPortCalloc( size_t xNum, size_t xSize )

classes.name: prvInsertBlockIntoFreeList
classes.signature: static void prvInsertBlockIntoFreeList( BlockLink_t * pxBlockToInsert ) /* PRIVILEGED_FUNCTION */

classes.name: vPortGetHeapStats
classes.description_zh: 返回 heap_4 的堆使用统计（空闲字节、最大/最小空闲块、分配次数）
classes.description_en: Return heap_4 usage statistics: free bytes, largest/smallest free block, and allocation counts.

classes.name: vPortDefineHeapRegions
classes.signature: static void prvInsertBlockIntoFreeList( BlockLink_t * pxBlockToInsert ) PRIVILEGED_FUNCTION; void vPortDefineHeapRegions( const HeapRegion_t * const pxHeapRegions ) PRIVILEGED_FUNCTION; #if ( configENABLE_HEAP_PROTECTOR == 1 ) /** * @brief Application provided function to get a random value to be used as canary. * * @param pxHeapCanary [out] Output parameter to return the canary value. */ extern void vApplicationGetRandomHeapCanary( portPOINTER_SIZE_TYPE * pxHeapCanary ); #endif /* configENABLE_HEAP_PROTECTOR */ /*-----------------------------------------------------------*/ /* The size of the structure placed at the beginning of each allocated memory * block must by correctly byte aligned. */ static const size_t xHeapStructSize = ( sizeof( BlockLink_t ) + ( ( size_t ) ( portBYTE_ALIGNMENT - 1 ) ) ) & ~( ( size_t ) portBYTE_ALIGNMENT_MASK ); /* Create a couple of list links to mark the start and end of the list. */ PRIVILEGED_DATA static BlockLink_t xStart; PRIVILEGED_DATA static BlockLink_t * pxEnd = NULL; /* Keeps track of the number of calls to allocate and free memory as well as the * number of free bytes remaining, but says nothing about fragmentation. */ PRIVILEGED_DATA static size_t xFreeBytesRemaining = ( size_t ) 0U; PRIVILEGED_DATA static size_t xMinimumEverFreeBytesRemaining = ( size_t ) 0U; PRIVILEGED_DATA static size_t xNumberOfSuccessfulAllocations = ( size_t ) 0U; PRIVILEGED_DATA static size_t xNumberOfSuccessfulFrees = ( size_t ) 0U; #if ( configENABLE_HEAP_PROTECTOR == 1 ) /* Canary value for protecting internal heap pointers. */ PRIVILEGED_DATA static portPOINTER_SIZE_TYPE xHeapCanary; /* Highest and lowest heap addresses used for heap block bounds checking. */ PRIVILEGED_DATA static uint8_t * pucHeapHighAddress = NULL; PRIVILEGED_DATA static uint8_t * pucHeapLowAddress = NULL; #endif /* configENABLE_HEAP_PROTECTOR */ /*-----------------------------------------------------------*/ void * pvPortMalloc( size_t xWantedSize )

classes.name: vPortFree
classes.description_zh: heap_5：释放并合并，面向跨多个非连续内存区的分配器
classes.description_en: heap_5: free-and-coalesce for the multi-region allocator that spans several non-contiguous memory blocks.

classes.name: pvPortCalloc
classes.signature: void * pvPortCalloc( size_t xNum, size_t xSize )

classes.name: prvInsertBlockIntoFreeList
classes.signature: static void prvInsertBlockIntoFreeList( BlockLink_t * pxBlockToInsert ) /* PRIVILEGED_FUNCTION */

classes.name: vPortDefineHeapRegions
classes.signature: void vPortDefineHeapRegions( const HeapRegion_t * const pxHeapRegions ) /* PRIVILEGED_FUNCTION */
classes.description_zh: 用应用提供的多块内存区域表初始化 heap_5，把不连续的 RAM 链成统一的空闲链表。
classes.description_en: Initialises heap_5 from the application-supplied table of memory regions, chaining discontiguous RAM blocks into one free list.

classes.name: vPortGetHeapStats
classes.description_zh: 遍历空闲链表生成堆运行时统计快照（剩余、历史最小剩余、最大可分配块等）。
classes.description_en: Walks the free list to produce a runtime heap statistics snapshot (free space, minimum-ever free, largest allocatable block).

layers.name: Events & Buffers
layers.summary: Lighter-weight synchronization: event groups (bit-flag rendezvous) and stream/message buffers (lock-free single-reader/single-writer byte and message transports).

classes.name: prvTestWaitCondition

classes.description_zh: 置位若干位并阻塞直到一组位齐备，实现多任务会合点（屏障）
classes.description_en: Set a group of bits then block until a required bit pattern is set by all participants — a task rendezvous barrier.

classes.name: xEventGroupWaitBits
classes.signature: EventBits_t xEventGroupWaitBits( EventGroupHandle_t xEventGroup, const EventBits_t uxBitsToWaitFor, const BaseType_t xClearOnExit, const BaseType_t xWaitForAllBits, TickType_t xTicksToWait )
classes.description_zh: 阻塞等待事件组中指定的位组合被置位，可在返回时清除这些位
classes.description_en: Block until a specified combination of bits is set in the event group, optionally clearing them on exit.

classes.name: xEventGroupClearBits
classes.signature: EventBits_t xEventGroupClearBits( EventGroupHandle_t xEventGroup, const EventBits_t uxBitsToClear )
classes.description_zh: 清除事件组中的指定位并返回清除前的位值
classes.description_en: Clear the requested bits in an event group, returning the value held before clearing.

classes.name: xEventGroupClearBitsFromISR
classes.signature: BaseType_t xEventGroupClearBitsFromISR( EventGroupHandle_t xEventGroup, const EventBits_t uxBitsToClear )
classes.description_zh: 中断安全的清位入口：把清位操作经 pend 调用转交定时器守护任务延后执行，避免在 ISR 中做不确定时长的工作。
classes.description_en: ISR-safe clear-bits entry: defers the clear to the timer daemon task via a pended function call, keeping non-deterministic work out of the ISR.

classes.name: xEventGroupSetBits
classes.signature: EventBits_t xEventGroupSetBits( EventGroupHandle_t xEventGroup, const EventBits_t uxBitsToSet )
classes.description_zh: 置位事件位并唤醒所有等待条件已满足的任务
classes.description_en: Set bits in an event group and unblock every waiting task whose wait condition is now met.

classes.name: vEventGroupDelete
classes.description_zh: 删除事件组并唤醒其上所有仍在阻塞的任务
classes.description_en: Delete an event group, unblocking any tasks still waiting on it.

classes.name: xEventGroupGetStaticBuffer
classes.signature: BaseType_t xEventGroupGetStaticBuffer( EventGroupHandle_t xEventGroup, StaticEventGroup_t ** ppxEventGroupBuffer )

classes.name: vEventGroupSetBitsCallback
classes.signature: void vEventGroupSetBitsCallback( void * pvEventGroup, uint32_t ulBitsToSet )
classes.description_zh: 在定时器守护任务上下文中代为执行 ISR 挂起的置位操作的回调。
classes.description_en: Callback run in the timer daemon task's context that performs set-bits operations pended from ISRs.

classes.name: vEventGroupClearBitsCallback
classes.signature: void vEventGroupClearBitsCallback( void * pvEventGroup, uint32_t ulBitsToClear )
classes.description_zh: 由定时器守护任务执行的清位回调，替中断完成挂起的清除操作
classes.description_en: Callback run in the timer daemon to complete a clear-bits operation pended from an ISR.

classes.name: prvTestWaitCondition
classes.signature: static BaseType_t prvTestWaitCondition( const EventBits_t uxCurrentEventBits, const EventBits_t uxBitsToWaitFor, const BaseType_t xWaitForAllBits )

classes.signature: BaseType_t xEventGroupSetBitsFromISR( EventGroupHandle_t xEventGroup, const EventBits_t uxBitsToSet, BaseType_t * pxHigherPriorityTaskWoken )

classes.signature: void vEventGroupSetNumber( void * xEventGroup, UBaseType_t uxEventGroupNumber )

layers.name: Software Timers
layers.summary: One-shot and auto-reload software timers driven by the timer-service (daemon) task, with a command queue decoupling callers from the timer task.

classes.description_zh: 无限期挂起任务，将其移出就绪/延时/事件链表直至被显式恢复
classes.description_en: Suspend a task indefinitely, removing it from the ready/delayed/event lists until explicitly resumed.

classes.name: prvTaskIsTaskSuspended
classes.signature: STATIC BaseType_t prvTaskIsTaskSuspended( const TaskHandle_t xTask )

classes.name: xTaskResumeFromISR
classes.description_zh: 在中断中恢复被挂起的任务，并报告是否需要上下文切换
classes.description_en: Resume a suspended task from an ISR and report whether a context switch is now required.

classes.name: prvCreateIdleTasks
classes.description_zh: 调度器启动时为每个核创建空闲任务（SMP 下还包括被动空闲任务）。
classes.description_en: Creates the idle task for each core (plus the passive idle tasks under SMP) when the scheduler starts.

classes.name: vTaskSuspendAll
classes.description_zh: 挂起调度器，推迟上下文切换但保持中断开启，是一种轻量临界区
classes.description_en: Suspend the scheduler so context switches are deferred while interrupts stay enabled — a lightweight critical section.

classes.name: prvGetExpectedIdleTime
classes.description_zh: 计算距下一个任务解除阻塞还有多少节拍，供 tickless idle 决定可休眠的时长。
classes.description_en: Computes how many ticks remain until the next task unblocks, telling tickless idle how long the CPU may sleep.

classes.name: xTaskResumeAll
classes.description_zh: 恢复调度器，补办挂起期间就绪的任务与错过的让出
classes.description_en: Resume the scheduler, processing tasks made ready and yields missed while it was suspended.

classes.name: prvSearchForNameWithinSingleList
classes.signature: STATIC TCB_t * prvSearchForNameWithinSingleList( List_t * pxList, const char pcNameToQuery[] )

classes.name: xTaskGetStaticBuffers
classes.signature: BaseType_t xTaskGetStaticBuffers( TaskHandle_t xTask, StackType_t ** ppuxStackBuffer, StaticTask_t ** ppxTaskBuffer )

classes.name: uxTaskGetSystemState
classes.signature: UBaseType_t uxTaskGetSystemState( TaskStatus_t * const pxTaskStatusArray, const UBaseType_t uxArraySize, configRUN_TIME_COUNTER_TYPE * const pulTotalRunTime )
classes.description_zh: 填充每个任务的状态快照（状态、优先级、栈水位、运行时间）供调试统计
classes.description_en: Fill a caller array with a state snapshot (state, priority, stack high-water, run-time) of every task.

classes.name: xTaskAbortDelay
classes.description_zh: 强制将阻塞中的任务移出阻塞态，使其等待提前结束
classes.description_en: Force a blocked task out of the Blocked state so its wait ends early.

classes.name: xTaskIncrementTick
classes.description_zh: 节拍中断的心跳：推进节拍计数、解除到期延时任务的阻塞、判定是否需要切换
classes.description_en: The tick-interrupt heartbeat: advance the tick count, unblock tasks whose delay expired, and report whether a context switch is now due.

classes.name: vTaskSetApplicationTaskTag
classes.signature: void vTaskSetApplicationTaskTag( TaskHandle_t xTask, TaskHookFunction_t pxHookFunction )

classes.name: xTaskCallApplicationTaskHook
classes.signature: BaseType_t xTaskCallApplicationTaskHook( TaskHandle_t xTask, void * pvParameter )

classes.name: vTaskPlaceOnEventList
classes.signature: void vTaskPlaceOnEventList( List_t * const pxEventList, const TickType_t xTicksToWait )
classes.description_zh: 将当前任务按优先级放入某对象的事件等待链表，并加入带超时的延时链表
classes.description_en: Block the current task on an object's event list (ordered by priority) and on the delayed list with a timeout.

classes.name: vTaskPlaceOnUnorderedEventList
classes.signature: void vTaskPlaceOnUnorderedEventList( List_t * pxEventList, const TickType_t xItemValue, const TickType_t xTicksToWait )
classes.description_zh: 将当前任务放入按值索引的无序事件等待链表，供事件组使用
classes.description_en: Block the current task on a value-keyed unordered event list — used by event groups.

classes.name: vTaskPlaceOnEventListRestricted
classes.signature: void vTaskPlaceOnEventListRestricted( List_t * const pxEventList, TickType_t xTicksToWait, const BaseType_t xWaitIndefinitely )
classes.description_zh: 在调度器已挂起的前提下把当前任务放入事件链表，供定时器任务的受限队列等待使用
classes.description_en: Place the current task on an event list while the scheduler is suspended — used by the timer task's restricted queue wait.

classes.name: xTaskRemoveFromEventList
classes.signature: BaseType_t xTaskRemoveFromEventList( const List_t * const pxEventList )
classes.description_zh: 事件发生时解除等待链表头部最高优先级任务的阻塞，并报告是否需抢占
classes.description_en: On an event, unblock the highest-priority task waiting on an event list and report whether it preempts the current task.

classes.name: vTaskRemoveFromUnorderedEventList
classes.signature: void vTaskRemoveFromUnorderedEventList( ListItem_t * pxEventListItem, const TickType_t xItemValue )
classes.description_zh: 从无序事件链表移除任务并使其就绪、写回事件返回值，供事件组使用
classes.description_en: Remove a task from an unordered event list and ready it, setting its event return value — used by event groups.

classes.name: vTaskInternalSetTimeOutState
classes.description_zh: 记录当前节拍作为后续阻塞超时计算的基准点
classes.description_en: Capture the current tick count as the reference point for subsequent block-timeout calculations.

classes.name: xTaskCheckForTimeOut
classes.signature: BaseType_t xTaskCheckForTimeOut( TimeOut_t * const pxTimeOut, TickType_t * const pxTicksToWait )
classes.description_zh: 判断阻塞超时是否已到，并按节拍溢出修正剩余等待时间
classes.description_en: Determine whether a block timeout has elapsed, adjusting the remaining wait for tick-count overflow.

classes.name: vTaskSetTaskNumber
classes.signature: void vTaskSetTaskNumber( TaskHandle_t xTask, const UBaseType_t uxHandle )

classes.name: vTaskSetThreadLocalStoragePointer
classes.signature: void vTaskSetThreadLocalStoragePointer( TaskHandle_t xTaskToSet, BaseType_t xIndex, void * pvValue )

classes.name: pvTaskGetThreadLocalStoragePointer
classes.signature: void * pvTaskGetThreadLocalStoragePointer( TaskHandle_t xTaskToQuery, BaseType_t xIndex )

classes.name: vTaskAllocateMPURegions
classes.signature: void vTaskAllocateMPURegions( TaskHandle_t xTaskToModify, const MemoryRegion_t * const pxRegions )

classes.name: prvInitialiseTaskLists
classes.description_zh: 首次创建任务时初始化全部就绪/延时/挂起等内核链表。
classes.description_en: Initialises every kernel list (ready, delayed, suspended, …) when the first task is created.

classes.name: prvCheckTasksWaitingTermination
classes.description_zh: 空闲任务的清理职责：释放已删除任务遗留的 TCB 与栈内存。
classes.description_en: The idle task's cleanup duty: frees the TCBs and stacks left behind by deleted tasks.

classes.name: vTaskGetInfo
classes.signature: void vTaskGetInfo( TaskHandle_t xTask, TaskStatus_t * pxTaskStatus, BaseType_t xGetFreeStackSpace, eTaskState eState )
classes.description_zh: 获取单个任务的详细状态信息（状态、优先级、栈使用、运行时间）
classes.description_en: Fill a structure with one task's detailed status: state, priority, stack usage, and run-time.

classes.name: prvListTasksWithinSingleList
classes.signature: STATIC UBaseType_t prvListTasksWithinSingleList( TaskStatus_t * pxTaskStatusArray, List_t * pxList, eTaskState eState )
classes.description_zh: 把单条状态链表中的任务快照填入 TaskStatus_t 数组，供 uxTaskGetSystemState 汇总。
classes.description_en: Fills a TaskStatus_t array with a snapshot of the tasks on one state list, feeding uxTaskGetSystemState.

classes.name: prvTaskCheckFreeStackSpace
classes.signature: STATIC configSTACK_DEPTH_TYPE prvTaskCheckFreeStackSpace( const uint8_t * pucStackByte )
classes.description_zh: 从栈底统计未被触碰的填充字节数，得出任务栈的历史最高水位。
classes.description_en: Counts the untouched fill bytes from the end of a stack to derive the task's stack high-water mark.

classes.name: prvResetNextTaskUnblockTime
classes.description_zh: 依据延时链表头重新计算下一次需要唤醒任务的节拍时刻。
classes.description_en: Recomputes the tick at which the next task must be woken from the head of the delayed list.

classes.name: xTaskGetCurrentTaskHandle
classes.description_zh: 返回当前核上正在运行任务的句柄
classes.description_en: Return the handle of the task currently running (on this core).

classes.name: xTaskGetSchedulerState
classes.description_zh: 报告调度器处于运行、挂起还是尚未启动
classes.description_en: Report whether the scheduler is running, suspended, or not yet started.

classes.name: xTaskPriorityInherit
classes.description_zh: 互斥量被更低优先级任务持有时，将持有者优先级提升至调用者水平（优先级继承）
classes.description_en: Raise a mutex holder's priority to the caller's level (priority inheritance) to bound priority inversion.

classes.name: vTaskPriorityDisinheritAfterTimeout
classes.signature: void vTaskPriorityDisinheritAfterTimeout( TaskHandle_t const pxMutexHolder, UBaseType_t uxHighestPriorityWaitingTask )
classes.description_zh: 等待互斥量超时后，按剩余等待者重新计算持有者应继承的优先级
classes.description_en: After a mutex wait times out, recompute the priority the holder should still inherit from the remaining waiters.

classes.name: prvWriteNameToBuffer
classes.signature: STATIC char * prvWriteNameToBuffer( char * pcBuffer, const char * pcTaskName )

classes.name: vTaskListTasks
classes.signature: void vTaskListTasks( char * pcWriteBuffer, size_t uxBufferLength )

classes.name: vTaskGetRunTimeStatistics
classes.signature: void vTaskGetRunTimeStatistics( char * pcWriteBuffer, size_t uxBufferLength )

classes.name: ulTaskGenericNotifyTake
classes.signature: uint32_t ulTaskGenericNotifyTake( UBaseType_t uxIndexToWaitOn, BaseType_t xClearCountOnExit, TickType_t xTicksToWait )

classes.name: xTaskGenericNotifyWait
classes.signature: BaseType_t xTaskGenericNotifyWait( UBaseType_t uxIndexToWaitOn, uint32_t ulBitsToClearOnEntry, uint32_t ulBitsToClearOnExit, uint32_t * pulNotificationValue, TickType_t xTicksToWait )

classes.name: xTaskGenericNotify
classes.signature: BaseType_t xTaskGenericNotify( TaskHandle_t xTaskToNotify, UBaseType_t uxIndexToNotify, uint32_t ulValue, eNotifyAction eAction, uint32_t * pulPreviousNotificationValue )

classes.name: xTaskGenericNotifyFromISR
classes.signature: BaseType_t xTaskGenericNotifyFromISR( TaskHandle_t xTaskToNotify, UBaseType_t uxIndexToNotify, uint32_t ulValue, eNotifyAction eAction, uint32_t * pulPreviousNotificationValue, BaseType_t * pxHigherPriorityTaskWoken )

classes.name: vTaskGenericNotifyGiveFromISR
classes.signature: void vTaskGenericNotifyGiveFromISR( TaskHandle_t xTaskToNotify, UBaseType_t uxIndexToNotify, BaseType_t * pxHigherPriorityTaskWoken )

classes.name: xTaskGenericNotifyStateClear
classes.signature: BaseType_t xTaskGenericNotifyStateClear( TaskHandle_t xTask, UBaseType_t uxIndexToClear )

classes.name: ulTaskGenericNotifyValueClear
classes.signature: uint32_t ulTaskGenericNotifyValueClear( TaskHandle_t xTask, UBaseType_t uxIndexToClear, uint32_t ulBitsToClear )

classes.name: prvAddCurrentTaskToDelayedList
classes.signature: STATIC void prvAddCurrentTaskToDelayedList( TickType_t xTicksToWait, const BaseType_t xCanBlockIndefinitely )
classes.description_zh: 把当前任务按唤醒时间移入（可能溢出的）延时链表——所有阻塞超时路径的共同终点。
classes.description_en: Moves the current task onto the (possibly overflowed) delayed list keyed by wake time — the common tail of every blocking-with-timeout path.

classes.name: vApplicationGetIdleTaskMemory
classes.signature: void vApplicationGetIdleTaskMemory( StaticTask_t ** ppxIdleTaskTCBBuffer, StackType_t ** ppxIdleTaskStackBuffer, configSTACK_DEPTH_TYPE * puxIdleTaskStackSize )

classes.name: vApplicationGetPassiveIdleTaskMemory
classes.signature: void vApplicationGetPassiveIdleTaskMemory( StaticTask_t ** ppxIdleTaskTCBBuffer, StackType_t ** ppxIdleTaskStackBuffer, configSTACK_DEPTH_TYPE * puxIdleTaskStackSize, BaseType_t xPassiveIdleTaskIndex )

classes.name: vApplicationGetTimerTaskMemory
classes.signature: void vApplicationGetTimerTaskMemory( StaticTask_t ** ppxTimerTaskTCBBuffer, StackType_t ** ppxTimerTaskStackBuffer, configSTACK_DEPTH_TYPE * puxTimerTaskStackSize )

layers.name: List Primitive
layers.summary: The ordered doubly-linked list the scheduler and every kernel object are built on — ready, delayed and event lists are all instances of it.

classes.name: vListInitialise
classes.description_zh: 将链表初始化为空，建立指向末端标记节点的环形结构，使后续插入按项值有序
classes.description_en: Initialise a list to empty, wiring its end-marker sentinel so later insertions stay ordered by item value.

classes.name: vListInsertEnd
classes.signature: void vListInsertEnd( List_t * const pxList, ListItem_t * const pxNewListItem )
classes.description_zh: 把节点插到链表索引之前的末端位置，提供调度器轮转依赖的 FIFO 顺序。
classes.description_en: Inserts an item at the list's end position just before the index, giving the FIFO order the scheduler's round-robin relies on.

classes.name: vListInsert
classes.signature: void vListInsert( List_t * const pxList, ListItem_t * const pxNewListItem )
classes.description_zh: 按节点值升序把节点插入链表——延时链表与事件链表有序排队的基础。
classes.description_en: Inserts an item in ascending item-value order — the basis of ordered queuing in the delayed and event lists.

classes.name: uxListRemove
classes.description_zh: 从所属链表中摘除一个链表项，并返回该链表剩余的项数
classes.description_en: Unlink a list item from whatever list owns it and return how many items remain in that list.

flows.name: 信号量获取与优先级继承 / Semaphore Take & Priority Inheritance
flows.description: 获取信号量或互斥量；互斥量被占用时阻塞并对持有者施加优先级继承，以抑制优先级反转 / Take a semaphore or mutex, blocking when held and applying priority inheritance to the holder to bound priority inversion.

flows.name: 队列发送 / Queue Send
flows.description: 将数据拷入队列；队列满时阻塞等待空间，写入后唤醒等待接收的最高优先级任务 / Copy an item into the queue, blocking when full until space frees, then unblock the highest-priority waiting receiver.

steps.label_zh: 队列未满：拷贝数据入队
steps.label_en: queue not full: copy item in

steps.label_zh: 唤醒等待接收的最高优先级任务
队列已满：挂入事件链表并设超时
steps.label_en: queue full: join the event list with a timeout

steps.label_zh: 按唤醒时间插入延时链表
steps.label_en: insert into the delayed list by wake time

flows.name: 队列接收与阻塞 / Queue Receive & Block
flows.description: 从队列取出数据；队列空时按优先级阻塞在事件链表并设超时，发送方到来时被唤醒 / Copy an item out of the queue, or block on the event list with a timeout when empty until a sender wakes the receiver.

flows.name: 流缓冲发送 / Stream Buffer Send
flows.description: 向环形流缓冲写入字节，空间不足时阻塞，达到触发水平后唤醒接收任务 / Write bytes into the ring buffer, blocking until space frees, and wake the receiver once the trigger level is reached.

flows.name: 事件组集合点同步 / Event Group Rendezvous (Sync)
flows.description: 任务置位自己的同步位后阻塞等待，直到参与各方的位全部置齐——多任务集合点 / A task sets its own sync bits then blocks until every participant's bits are set — a multi-task rendezvous point.

flows.name: 事件组等待位 / Event Group Wait Bits
flows.description: 阻塞在无序事件链表上，直到事件组中指定的位组合被置位 / Block on the unordered event list until the requested combination of bits becomes set in the event group.

flows.name: 任务删除 / Task Delete
flows.description: 将任务移出所有链表并回收资源；自删除任务的栈延后由空闲任务清理 / Remove a task from every list and reclaim its memory, deferring a self-deleting task's stack cleanup to the idle task.

flows.name: 启动调度器与首个任务 (Cortex-M) / Start Scheduler & First Task (Cortex-M)
flows.description: Cortex-M4F 端口配置 SysTick 与 FPU，经 SVC 启动首个任务，之后由 PendSV 驱动上下文切换 / The Cortex-M4F port sets up SysTick and the FPU, launches the first task via SVC, then drives later context switches from PendSV.

flows.name: 上下文切换 (POSIX 模拟器) / Context Switch (POSIX Simulator)
flows.description: 在宿主机上以挂起当前 pthread、唤醒下一个 pthread 的方式模拟内核的上下文切换 / Emulates the kernel's context switch on the host by suspending the current task's pthread and resuming the next one.

steps.label_zh: 记录让出前的当前任务
steps.label_en: capture the current task before yielding

steps.label_zh: 解析下一任务对应的 pthread
挂起自身直至再次被调度
醒来后恢复执行并退出临界区
steps.label_en: resume on wake and exit the critical section

flows.name: 任务延时阻塞 / Task Delay & Block
flows.description: 在调度器锁保护下将当前任务按唤醒时间移入延时链表，节拍到期后由节拍处理解除阻塞 / Under a scheduler lock, move the current task into the delayed list by wake time; the tick handler unblocks it when the delay expires.
